children.name: Sub
children.content: Design tokens, type scale, colour, elevation, spacing & tint — the foundations that are NOT components. The component sections now instance the 55 registered components from the Component Library (single source of truth).

children.name: B
children.content: This board documents only the foundations below — tokens, type, colour, elevation, spacing, tint. Instance components from the library rather than rebuilding them here.
